data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Use of strong SSL/TLS encryption to protect data in transit.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: WAF implemented to filter and monitor HTTP requests.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: MFA is required to enhance the security of user accounts.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify vulnerabilities.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Measures in place to protect against DDoS attacks.
